Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Have Requests For Admissions Propounded Ondf George Delapa, Jr, Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Nov-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Tewkam Berhane's motion to deem certain matters admitted is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on October 25, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
